seoTitle: Ongerup vs Onslow — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ongerup and Onslow. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ongerup and Onslow.
heading: Ongerup vs Onslow — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ongerup, Western Australia and Onslow, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Onslow has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Ongerup (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ongerup or Onslow safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ongerup has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Onslow scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ongerup scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Onslow scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ongerup or Onslow?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Onslow has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
